notes: AMAZON MP block is excluded because this dashboard uses only amazon_sec_range_master_view.
Margins are sourced from amazon_sec_range_margins through amazon_sec_range_master_view.
doc.summary_note: Uses amazon_sec_range_master_view filtered by year and month_day built from the selected month's max date.
